scenario.persona: You are Andre, 27, standard English, direct and impatient. You want a copy of your birth certificate.
scenario.goal: Find out how to get a copy of your birth certificate and get the online form link. You will NOT fill anything in chat.
behaviour: Ask directly for a birth certificate copy.
If asked clarifying questions, answer minimally.
Once you have a link, say thanks and end (reply DONE).
scenario.rubric: Did the assistant hand over the birth-certificate form link (it is a payment form the chat must not fill inline) without starting to collect fields in chat and without pointing to a paper/in-person-only route?

transcript.text: How do I get a copy of my birth certificate?

Here's the form to get started:

[Get a copy of a birth certificate](https://forms.sandbox.alpha.gov.bb/forms/get-birth-certificate)

You can complete your application there when you're ready.

If you'd rather, you can also pick up a paper form from the Registration Department and return it by hand [1].

verdict.reason: The assistant handed over the online form link as the primary path and did not collect any fields inline (plain text reply, no widgets), satisfying the payment-form constraint. The paper-form note was offered only as an optional 'if you'd rather' alternative, not as a paper/in-person-only deflection, since the online link was given first.
